# Hongdae Radio

> Hongdae Radio is a Seoul-based ambient music YouTube channel producing instrumental mixes — acoustic guitar, piano, and bossa nova — designed for work, study, cafe visits, and quiet relaxation.

## About

- Channel: Hongdae Radio (@HongdaeRadio)
- Based in: Seoul, South Korea (Hongdae area)
- Genre: Ambient, Acoustic, Bossa Nova, Lo-fi, Instrumental
- Language: Korean / English
- Platform: YouTube

## YouTube Channel

- URL: https://www.youtube.com/@HongdaeRadio
- Full Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBIn_rMVsvR7G7UydGECeXJuFC2YFagUI

## Latest Videos

- A Morning for Reading: https://youtu.be/BoghrxDJK18
- Rainy Day Piano: https://youtu.be/GX32KRCPf8I
- Midnight Piano & Strings: https://youtu.be/kFINEhrs3Hg
- Golden Hour: https://youtu.be/jSH-VV5MsNA

## Playlists

- ☕ Cafe Hours — Music for all cafe moods
- 🌙 Late Night Lo-fi — Late night ambient
- 🌧️ Rainy Mood — Rain and piano ambient
